package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for cache_method_uses_context_background: Cache implementations that call context.Background() or context.TODO() instead of propagating caller context.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: context; severity: warning.
func scenario234Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(context.Background(), http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
}
